column3: East and Kwanza and Five (5) Constituencies’ namely Kiminini, Endebess, Cherangany, Saboti
and kwanza. All the constituencies have a total of twenty five (25) Wards. It is only Kitale
town which is classified according to the Urban Areas and Cities Act 2011, the other upcoming
urban center is Kiminini. The main market centers include Kachibora, Endebess, Gitwamba,
Maili Saba, Sikhendu, Mucharage, Sibanga and Kesogon.
